sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38573" key="e)pe/krhcis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπέκ-ρηξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">outbreak, bursting out,</tr_> Epicur.E<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">p.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2p.54U.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
